questions.statement: The highest peak of the peninsular plateau is-
&nbsp;_________ is NOT among the three major rivers originating from the Western Ghats.

options: i - d, ii - c, iii - b, iv - a /
i - c, ii - d, iii - b, iv - a /
i - c, ii - a, iii - d, iv - b /
i - c, ii - d, iii - a, iv - b /
